prompt: Build a customer-facing one-page website concept for Precision Roof Restore, a roofing and roof restoration business serving Brisbane. Do not ask questions. Do not show a questionnaire. Use the information below and produce the actual concept files now. Verified facts: - Business name: Precision Roof Restore - Industry: roofing / roof restoration - Location/service area: Brisbane - Phone: 0424 371 622 - Tel link: tel:0424371622 - Services: roof restorations, capping, respray, repairs, gutters, pressure cleaning Audience: Homeowners comparing roof restoration and repair options who need a clear reason to call and enough confidence to request a quote. Goal: Generate phone calls and enquiry form submissions. Required page sections: 1. Hero with a strong local roofing headline, phone CTA, and secondary enquiry CTA. 2. Visual proof area with a project-local roofing/roof restoration visual asset. Create a local SVG or image asset if no real photo is available. Do not make the page text-only. 3. Services section with all six services, written in practical customer language. 4. Why call section: clear inspection/quote path, service-area honesty, fast response positioning without fake guarantees. 5. Contact/enquiry section with form fields: name, phone, service needed, suburb, message, preferred call time. 6. Footer with phone and service area. Design direction: Practical local-service website, not editorial. Use a stronger roofing palette with roof/metal/sky accents, clear CTA contrast, mobile-first layout, and a confident trade-business feel. The page should look like something a real roofing company could send to a homeowner. Copy rules: - Customer-facing only. - Do not mention mockup, demo, pre-sale, internal, audit, verification, Resend, ProfitsLocal, hi@profitslocal.com, or implementation details. - Do not invent email, exact address, awards, years in business, certifications, reviews, prices, licenses, or response guarantees. - It is okay to use generic but plausible service copy and form placeholder text. - Avoid "Welcome to", "Your trusted partner", AI-looking gradients, empty placeholder blocks, and generic stock-photo language. Technical output: - Create index.html. - Create at least one local visual asset file under assets/ and reference it from index.html with an tag or CSS background URL. - Use href="tel:0424371622" wherever the phone CTA appears. - The form can be static for the concept; do not expose backend provider names or internal recipient emails in customer-visible HTML.

continuationRuns.prompt: Keep the same concept and files. Make a focused visual polish pass: ensure every primary CTA button has high-contrast readable text on mobile and desktop, especially the top navigation phone button. Keep customer-facing copy only. Do not mention mockup, demo, audit, internal, Resend, ProfitsLocal, or hi@profitslocal.com. Preserve the local roofing visual asset, phone 0424 371 622, tel:0424371622, and all six services. Do not ask questions. Finish with updated files.
